message:
fix(ci): restrict bash process-tree test to Linux + robust Windows error check

- test_bash_timeout_kills_process_tree: restrict to #[cfg(target_os = "linux")]
  since macOS process group kill doesn't reliably propagate to background
  subshells, making this test flaky on macOS CI.
- read_nonexistent_file_reports_error: use case-insensitive matching and add
  "os error 2" fallback for Windows error message compatibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
